summary: NIA Data Coverage Dashboard UI verification completed successfully. The backend endpoint /api/ib-collector/data-coverage returns valid data with 12,198 symbols, and the frontend correctly displays this data in the Coverage tab within the Historical Data Collection panel.

details: NIA page loads successfully via localStorage navigation (data-testid='nav-nia' available in sidebar)
Page header shows 'NIA - Neural Intelligence Agency'
Train Everything panel visible with last trained status
Subtitle shows: 'Per-stock multi-timeframe • Smart ADV filtering'
Coverage tab is visible and selected by default
ADV Cache shows '12,198 symbols' in green (matches backend API)
Coverage by Tier section displays correctly
Data Gaps (12 total) section visible at bottom of Coverage tab

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All coverage data displays correctly in NIA page)

context_for_next_testing_agent: NIA Data Coverage Dashboard verified working. Navigation: set localStorage 'tradecommand_activeTab' to 'nia' or click data-testid='nav-nia'. Key data-testids: data-collection-panel, data-collection-panel-toggle. The Coverage tab shows ADV cache with 12,198 symbols and per-tier/per-timeframe coverage percentages. Backend API /api/ib-collector/data-coverage confirmed working.
